sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
green_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
red_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R')
print(f"Green: {green_total}, Red: {red_total}")

print("\nAll non-background nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'S':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:6]}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Current state ===")
for i in range(34, 56):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][35:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
